news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran is escalating, with significant regional impacts including attacks in the Gulf and rising tensions in Israel and Palestine.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict, Iranian attacks, Israeli military actions, global protests against Trump, energy crisis in Egypt

news:news.news:title: US churches are increasingly developing land for affordable housing, while the Iran war disrupts oil markets and impacts US businesses.
news:news.news:keywords: affordable housing initiatives, impact of Iran war on oil prices, US border business struggles, minimum wage increase movements, Trump administration policies

news:news.news:title: Bluesky launched Attie, an AI app for customizing feeds, while Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers various tech deals, including AI-powered gadgets.
news:news.news:keywords: AI in social media, Amazon Spring Sale tech deals, impact of Macintosh on computing

news:news.news:title: UConn and UCLA both secured spots in the Final Four, while Gary Woodland won the Houston Open amid personal challenges.
news:news.news:keywords: March Madness updates, NCAA Final Four results, Gary Woodland Houston Open victory

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific studies reveal significant health risks associated with sugar substitutes, breakthroughs in pain management, and new insights into human evolution and water behavior.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, advancements in pain management, new findings in human evolution, understanding water behavior, quantum computing breakthroughs

news:news.news:title: The ongoing conflict in Iran and recent violence in Lebanon highlight escalating tensions in the region, while a tragic migrant incident off Greece raises humanitarian concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran conflict analysis, Lebanon violence impact, migrant crisis in Greece, US protests against Trump, Epstein lawsuit settlement implications

news:news.news:title: US border businesses face challenges as Canadian tourists decline, while the stock market continues to struggle amid rising oil prices and geopolitical tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: US border business challenges, US stock market trends, minimum wage increases, impact of Iran war on economy, Ticketmaster fee changes

news:news.news:title: Suno's latest AI music model update emphasizes user customization, while Amazon's Big Spring Sale attracts shoppers with various deals.
news:news.news:keywords: AI music model updates, Amazon Spring Sale deals, Meta legal challenges, OpenAI video app discontinuation, foldable phone technology

news:news.news:title: Arizona and Illinois advance to the Final Four, while the USMNT faces a setback against Belgium in World Cup preparations.
news:news.news:keywords: NCAA Final Four updates, UFC fight results, USMNT World Cup preparation, Dominic Smith Braves walk-off, LeBron and Bronny James history

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant health risks from sugar substitutes, advancements in carbon capture technology, and new insights into human evolution and animal behavior.
news:news.news:keywords: health risks of sugar substitutes, carbon capture technology advancements, human evolution discoveries, animal behavior studies, space weather research

news:news.news:title: Iran Conflict Escalates as US Markets Dive for Fifth Week Amid Rising Oil Prices
Iran-Lebanon Violence Escalates as Migrant Tragedy Off Greece Raises Humanitarian Alarm
